overall.description: First-person perspective from a survival video game showing a character walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass during a dark, stormy night. The player initially holds a lit torch before lowering it, navigating through heavy rain and fog with limited visibility in a wilderness environment.

events.description: character lowers the lit torch out of frame, continuing to walk with free hands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the stormy wilderness, initially holding a torch which is then lowered out of view

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
dense tall wild grass lining the left side of the path
dense tall wild grass lining the right side of the path
wooden posts marking the trail edge, appearing periodically as the camera advances
dark storm clouds covering the night sky with visible rain falling

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense tall grass during a dark stormy night. Wooden marker posts appear periodically on the right side of the path. The sky is completely overcast with storm clouds, and rain falls steadily as fog limits visibility. The character initially holds a torch which is lowered after a few seconds, continuing to navigate the wilderness path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a desolate wilderness trail during a dark, stormy night. It begins with the camera navigating a narrow dirt path flanked by dense tall grass, where the immediate surroundings are illuminated by a handheld torch. As the character progresses, the torch is lowered, causing the warm light to recede and leaving the view to be dominated by the oppressive gloom of an overcast sky. The scene then shifts into a state of limited visibility as steady rain and thick fog envelop the landscape, with wooden marker posts appearing periodically on the right to guide the way through the storm.
